channel.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
channel.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

image.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
image.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

item.title: Trump’s intelligence chief nominee won’t say Biden won 2020 election
item.description: US President Trump’s nominee for top intel official, Jay Clayton, evaded directly stating that Biden won 2020 election

item.title: UK proposes voluntary overnight social media curfew for older teens
item.description: Latest government measure aimed at curbing digital harm comes after under-16 social media ban announced last month.

item.title: Argentina’s Falklands banner sparks controversy at World Cup
item.description: Argentina players held up a banner declaring ‘Las Malvinas son Argentinas’ after beating England.

item.title: Former US Ambassador says Iran miscalculated Trump’s resolve
item.description: Nightly strikes between the US and Iran have been the heaviest since the Memorandum of Understanding (MOU) agreement.

item.title: Senior Chinese delegation visits North Korea for talks
item.description: China's fourth-highest-ranked official, Wang Huning, held talks with a top official of North Korea's governing party.

item.title: South Korea’s international adoptees seek justice, not homecoming
item.description: South Korea's government has acknowledged wrongs, but advocates say accountability is still lacking.

item.title: Toronto engulfed by wildfire smoke as US cities threatened
item.description: Monitor ranks Toronto as having the worst air quality on earth, surpassing Kinshasa, DR Congo, and New Delhi, India.

item.title: Iran launches strikes on Gulf, even as FM visits Qatar
item.description: Iranian FM Araghchi visits Qatar to pay respects following the death of the Father Emir, Sheikh Hamad bin al Thani

item.title: Two killed in Russian missile fire on Kyiv after Ukraine-EU drone deal
item.description: Mayor Vitali Klitschko says emergency services are battling blazes across the Ukrainian capital.

item.title: France’s Morocco reset: What French PM Lecornu’s visit to Rabat signals
item.description: The trip highlights how Paris and Rabat are turning a diplomatic rapprochement into a broader strategic partnership.

item.title: Iranian doctor says US strike damaged children’s cancer hospital
item.description: Iranians are inspecting the damage from days of US strikes on key cities in the country’s south and west.

item.title: Celebrations erupt in Argentina’s capital after World Cup semifinal win
item.description: Jubilant fans leapt with joy in Buenos Aires after Argentina defeated England 2-1 in Wednesday’s World Cup semifinal.

item.title: Wildfire smoke engulfs Toronto, Canada and turns its skies orange
item.description: Wildfire smoke turned skies orange over Toronto and the rest of Ontario.

item.title: ‘Epic squared’: Scaloni lauds Argentina’s back-to-back World Cup comebacks
item.description: 'There was blood in the water, and we went for it,' Argentina coach said of the relentless late attacks against England.

item.title: Iran war live: US hits Iranian oil tanker; Tehran attacks Kuwait, Jordan
item.description: Iranian media report explosions on Qeshm Island, Bandar Abbas and Chabahar, as Bahrain and Kuwait sound air raid sirens.

item.title: Tuchel defends tactics after Argentina send England packing from World Cup
item.description: England manager Tuchel swapped Reece James for Dan Burn, and Declan Rice for defender Nico O’Reilly in the 82nd minute.

item.title: Argentina players brandish political Falklands flag after England match
item.description: The banner, held up by Lisandro Martinez and Giovani Lo Celso, goes against FIFA’s Stadium Code of Conduct.

item.title: US Justice Department refuses New Mexico’s request for Epstein files
item.description: New Mexico says the withheld records are critical to its criminal investigation into alleged abuse at Epstein’s ranch.

item.title: ‘Really big news’: What to know about Trump’s primetime speech on Thursday
item.description: The address comes as the White House revives scrutiny of the 2020 election and pushes new voting restrictions.

item.title: Iran says peace deal voided, fighting ‘existential war’ after US attacks
item.description: The US announced a new wave of attacks Wednesday night, amid reported explosions in Bandar Abbas, Chabahar and Ahvaz.

item.title: Argentina stun England in 2-1 comeback win to reach 2026 World Cup final
item.description: Holders Argentina will face Spain in the final after snatching victory from England in ⁠a highly charged encounter.

item.title: xAI sues user for exploiting AI tool to sexualise minors
item.description: Lawsuit accuses Terry Harwood of misusing xAI to bypass safeguards and produce explicit deepfakes involving minors.

item.title: Authors, publishers sue Google over alleged AI copyright infringement
item.description: Hachette and Elsevier lead US legal action against Google, alleging misuse of books for Gemini AI model training.

item.title: Sheinbaum rejects US claim that Mexico’s government is linked to cartels
item.description: Sheinbaum has denounced remarks from DEA head Terry Cole as a baseless 'political statement' about Mexico.

item.title: What are the obstacles to peace between Israel and Lebanon?
item.description: Another round of talks is under way between Israel and Lebanon to try to advance the ceasefire agreement.
